title: Midnight Lockbox
hook: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next.
location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels

villain.worldview: Storage is memory, and memory belongs to whoever controls access.
villain.motive: Turn investigators into gatekeepers who sell selective truth.

arcs.title: Lockbox Contact
arcs.summary: An impossible voicemail starts the case at the storage facility.

arcs.title: Leak and Fracture
arcs.summary: Daylight leaks force trust decisions under public pressure.

arcs.title: Second-Night Reckoning
arcs.summary: A final tunnel run decides truth, compromise, or collapse.

beats.title: Unit 331 pings alive
beats.narrative: At 11:47 p.m., a voicemail from unit 331 predicts your next text message word for word.

incomingMessages.text: At 11:47 p.m., a voicemail from unit 331 predicts your next text message word for word. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Voicemail waveform anomaly.
Unit 331 has your fingerprints now, not mine. (Peripheral Presence)

responseOptions.label: Audit keypad logs and access events before sunrise
responseOptions.summary: Choice 1: Audit keypad logs and access events before sunrise

responseOptions.label: Interview the night manager before he leaves shift
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Interview the night manager before he leaves shift

beats.title: Lock Cylinder Swap
beats.narrative: You find a fresh lock core with a key that should not exist in facility inventory.

incomingMessages.text: You find a fresh lock core with a key that should not exist in facility inventory. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Keypad access hash export.
Unit 331 has your fingerprints now, not mine. (Peripheral Presence)

beats.title: Morning Leak
beats.narrative: By morning, cropped footage of your team appears online before your own upload completes.

incomingMessages.text: By morning, cropped footage of your team appears online before your own upload completes. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Freight elevator camera still.
You keep protecting the wrong employee. (Psychological Contact)

responseOptions.label: Trust Case Lead Veda Cross and seal internal channels
responseOptions.summary: Choice 1: Trust Case Lead Veda Cross and seal internal channels

responseOptions.label: Trust Night Manager Eli Mercer and follow his blind spot map
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Trust Night Manager Eli Mercer and follow his blind spot map

beats.title: Noon Ultimatum
beats.narrative: The antagonist sends a noon deadline: open the lockbox publicly or lose your only witness.

incomingMessages.text: The antagonist sends a noon deadline: open the lockbox publicly or lose your only witness. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Drain tunnel pressure map.
If you open the box before noon, your witness walks. If not, count the sirens. (Active Interference)

responseOptions.label: Divert to save threatened NPC
responseOptions.summary: Choice 1: Divert to save threatened NPC

responseOptions.label: Continue forensic pursuit under threat
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Continue forensic pursuit under threat

beats.title: Drain Tunnel Run
beats.narrative: Twelve hours later, the tunnel route opens and you must choose recovery or confrontation.

incomingMessages.text: Twelve hours later, the tunnel route opens and you must choose recovery or confrontation. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Voicemail waveform anomaly.
Hand me the access list and I return everyone alive. (Personal Confrontation)

responseOptions.label: Commit to formal accusation and expose evidence chain
responseOptions.summary: Choice 1: Commit to formal accusation and expose evidence chain

responseOptions.label: Take private contact route for hidden confession
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Take private contact route for hidden confession

beats.title: Lockbox Debrief
beats.narrative: A final memo reveals whether your team solved the case or joined the cover-up.

incomingMessages.text: A final memo reveals whether your team solved the case or joined the cover-up. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Keypad access hash export.
Hand me the access list and I return everyone alive. (Personal Confrontation)

responseOptions.label: Proceed with controlled pressure
responseOptions.summary: Advance investigation while preserving evidence discipline.

endings.title: Sealed Evidence Conviction
endings.summary: You preserve the chain and expose the extortion network before the deadline.
endings.epilogue: Unit 331 is seized with intact evidence, and the witness enters protection.
endings.sequelHook: A tagged evidence box points to the next case.

endings.title: Witness Saved, Truth Damaged
endings.summary: You save the witness but lose admissible evidence in the rush.
endings.epilogue: The team survives, but the case closes with permanent doubt.
endings.sequelHook: A surviving witness asks for help in a linked disappearance.

endings.title: Quartermaster Pact
endings.summary: You trade transparency for operational control over future lockboxes.
endings.epilogue: You receive master access and the next target list at dawn.
endings.sequelHook: Season continuity marks the player as compromised.

nodes.label: The Quartermaster
nodes.summary: Planner controlling lock schedules and leak timing.

nodes.label: Courier Witness Sia Rowan
nodes.summary: Witness with partial route data and shifting alibi.

nodes.label: Gallowglass Storage
nodes.summary: Facility where unit 331 generates predictive voicemails.

nodes.label: Voicemail Waveform
nodes.summary: Audio signature that appears before each threat window.

timeline.summary: Witness account conflicts with archive records.
Villain contact shifts to direct intimidation.

playerBriefing.recruitmentReason: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next. Your pattern-recognition profile flagged a match with prior unresolved incidents.
playerBriefing.openingIncident: At 11:47 p.m., a voicemail from unit 331 predicts your next text message word for word.
playerBriefing.personalStakes: The Quartermaster has fixated on The player detective profile. If the case stalls, collateral witnesses remain exposed.
playerBriefing.firstDirective: Lockbox Contact: An impossible voicemail starts the case at the storage facility. Maintain evidence discipline and document every threat marker.

weeks.label: Week 1 - Recruitment And Baseline
weeks.objective: At 11:47 p.m., a voicemail from unit 331 predicts your next text message word for word.
keyMoments: An impossible voicemail starts the case at the storage facility.

weeks.label: Week 2 - Contradiction Mapping
weeks.objective: Daylight leaks force trust decisions under public pressure.

weeks.label: Week 3 - Escalation Window
weeks.objective: Run live interventions while antagonist pressure rises and trust fractures.
keyMoments: Public reveal versus covert extraction at noon
Inside-job extortion ring using predictive surveillance

weeks.label: Week 4 - Endgame And Debrief
weeks.objective: A final tunnel run decides truth, compromise, or collapse.
keyMoments: Anomalous lockbox artifact that mirrors future intent
A second lockbox in another city starts transmitting the same timestamp.

npcDossiers.notableSecret: Lead Investigator Mara Quinn can expose midnight-lockbox-clue-pressure at high trust.
Dispatch Handler Ilya Ross can expose midnight-lockbox-clue-reveal at high trust.

motivations: Stay out of custody and protect a sibling
npcDossiers.notableSecret: Commuter Witness Nia Vale can expose midnight-lockbox-clue-origin at high trust.

motivations: Document how the lock was spoofed
npcDossiers.notableSecret: Transit Auditor Bram Keene can expose midnight-lockbox-clue-pressure at high trust.

communityPuzzles.title: Unit Grid Reconstruction
communityPuzzles.objective: Combine shared lock patterns to identify the real unit sequence.

shards.content: Host gets lock serials without floor order.
Ally gets floor order without serials.
Broadcast drop includes the timing offset key.

communityPuzzles.failureConsequence: Wrong sequence triggers false evidence upload and witness relocation.
